text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
191 
GAP_PARTIAL_TYPE_TIER_04 
LABEL: 
Type of Partial Gap Coverage on Tier 4 
DESCRIPTION: For tiers that offer some cost sharing coverage for a partial list of drugs during the gap (i.e., those 
where the GAP_PARTIAL_TIER value for this tier = "Y" [yes]), this variable describes the type(s) of 
drugs. 
Applies only to enhanced plans with gap coverage. 
The value contains a string
